description_long: This is a small residential cabin nestled within a dense forest of evergreen trees, surrounded by natural terrain and large boulders. The cabin itself is constructed primarily of wood, with a gable roof and a modest footprint, blending harmoniously with its woodland environment. The roof is pitched and appears to be covered with shingles, while the exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks. Several windows are visible, symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing natural light to enter the interior. A small porch extends from the front, providing a sheltered entryway and a spot to enjoy the surrounding scenery. The entire scene is characterized by a naturalistic layout, with the cabin centrally located and partially obscured by the dense tree cover.
description: A small wooden cabin with a gable roof sits at the center of a dense evergreen forest, surrounded by boulders and natural terrain. The cabin features a front porch, multiple windows, and blends seamlessly into its woodland setting.
description_view_0: The cabin is partially visible through a thick cluster of evergreen trees, with the front porch and entryway peeking out from the foliage and boulders in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view shows the cabin more obscured by trees, with only the roof and a hint of the structure visible through the dense forest canopy.
description_view_2: From this angle, the cabin is almost entirely surrounded by trees, with the roof and some windows faintly visible, emphasizing the secluded nature of the setting.
description_view_3: The front of the cabin is most clearly visible here, with the porch, entry door, and several windows facing outward, framed by trees and large rocks.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in shingles, slight overhangs on all sides
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically distributed on the front and partially visible on the sides, with no large or clustered groupings
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the porch
